# Vendored test data

The `.test` files in this directory are copied unmodified from
[google/googlesql](https://github.com/google/googlesql)
(`googlesql/parser/testdata/` at release
[2026.01.1](https://github.com/google/googlesql/releases/tag/2026.01.1),
commit `36dd14a`), which is licensed under the Apache License 2.0 (see the
LICENSE file at the repository root). Copyright Google LLC.

Do not edit the `.test` files. The `.metadata.json` sidecar files are part of
zetajones (not vendored) and track which cases the parser does not handle
yet.
